questions.question: Describe the primary difference between a 'weak AI' and a 'strong AI' based on the historical context of Artificial Intelligence. Provide an example to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the early years of AI research and development.

questions.question: What are the key characteristics of an intelligent agent, as defined in the context of Artificial Intelligence? Provide at least two examples of real-world applications of intelligent agents.
questions.hint: Focus on the definition of an intelligent agent and its relevance to real-world scenarios.

questions.question: Explain the concept of 'black box' and 'white box' AI systems, highlighting the advantages and disadvantages of each. Provide a scenario where a 'white box' AI system might be preferred over a 'black box' AI system.
questions.hint: Focus on the implications of AI systems being transparent or opaque.
